label: Kew
evidence: Wikidata Q1740301's P625 = (51.4837 -0.2780) for the West London suburb. DB had (53.0 -2.0) which is central UK — clearly wrong. Coord came from a v0.25 snapshot-pipeline geonames_api lookup that landed on the wrong entity. Wikidata QID is now in VEI (added 2026-05-10) and the row was promoted to deterministic, but the coord wasn't updated to match. This row fixes the lat/lon to align with the now-claimed authority.

label: Haarlemmermeer
evidence: Wikidata Q9924's P625 = (52.3008 4.6653) for the Dutch municipality / former lake (Hoofddorp area). DB had (52.25 5.75) which is near Amersfoort — wrong. Coord came from snapshot-pipeline tgn_via_wikidata_p1667 lookup that mis-resolved the entity. Same fix pattern as Kew.

label: Roxburghshire
evidence: Wikidata Q664892's P625 = (55.5689 -2.4783) for the historic county in southern Scotland. DB had (57.0 -4.0) which is the central Highlands — wrong. DB label 'Boxburghshire' is also a B/R typo for Roxburghshire. Same fix pattern as Kew.
